Lord of the Empire Outfit

Once in a while, when an ally is being stripped of their armor from 3 enemies for 3 sec. They lose 60% of their armor stats and can't use their armor abilities for 3 sec.
Armor can't be stripped from the unit for the duration of the battle.

Requirements: 98-100
